Build a residue -> MSA column lookup

Source: R/coord_map.R
build_msa_coord_map.Rd

For one row of a multiple sequence alignment (the "reference" sequence), build a map from ungapped residue position (1, 2, 3, ...) to alignment column.

Usage

build_msa_coord_map(msa, ref_name = NULL)

Arguments

msa

An object understood by ggmsa: an AAMultipleAlignment, DNAMultipleAlignment, AAStringSet, DNAStringSet, character vector of equal-length sequences, or a path to a FASTA file.

ref_name

Name of the reference sequence in the MSA. The default `NULL` uses the first sequence.

Value

A data.frame with columns `residue_pos`, `aa`, `msa_col`. Gap columns in the reference are skipped.
